major.comment: Major release: full signals-based web component framework built on @vielzeug/stateit; reactive html and css tagged templates with conditional rendering (html.when, html.each, html.show, html.match); component lifecycle hooks (onMount, onUnmount, onUpdated, onCleanup); prop/defineProps for reflected DOM attributes; context API (provide/inject/createContext); form-associated custom elements with ElementInternals; delegated event handling via handle(); shadow DOM refs and refs() helpers; defineEmits and defineSlots for typed component contracts
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
